title: Carriage in violation of law
doc_html:
§8.  Carriage in violation of law

No person shall engage in the business of carrying passengers for hire by airplane without having first complied with all the provisions of this Chapter.

Whoever violates this section shall be fined not more than one thousand dollars or imprisoned for not more than six months, or both.
doc_text:
§8.  Carriage in violation of law
No person shall engage in the business of carrying passengers for hire by airplane without having first complied with all the provisions of this Chapter.
Whoever violates this section shall be fined not more than one thousand dollars or imprisoned for not more than six months, or both.
